bio_desc: Computer Civil Engineer with interest in cybersecurity and experience in backend development with Laravel and frontend with Angular. Familiar with networks, firewalls and vulnerability analysis in real environments.
exp_haulmer_desc1: Maintenance and improvement of Laravel and Angular backends, optimizing electronic document processes
exp_haulmer_desc2: Laravel API development with GraphQL and frontend integration
exp_haulmer_desc3: Bug fixing and SQL database optimization
exp_haulmer_desc4: Use of Git, Docker and Azure for version control and deployments
port_keylogger_nombre: Unauthorized access via phishing and keylogger
port_keylogger_resumen: Phishing and a keylogger compromised an account, enabling data extraction and remote access via Metasploit.
port_firewall_nombre: Firewall and VPN Configuration in Cisco Packet Tracer
port_firewall_resumen: ASA Firewall and Site-to-Site VPN configuration using Cisco Packet Tracer.
port_ftp_nombre: Basic FTP server with Python sockets
port_ftp_resumen: Implementation of an FTP server and client with multi-client support via threads, an admin console and binary transfer over sockets.
port_linux_audit_resumen: Python tool that automates security auditing against the CIS Benchmark for Ubuntu 24.04, with multiple output formats and progress tracking.
port_llm_nombre: Automatic Essay Scoring with LLM Agents
port_llm_resumen: Agent-based LLM system using RAG to automatically grade university reports against rubrics, developed as undergraduate thesis.
